title: Stack Navigate
description: Move from one screen to another within a Native Stack Navigator using the navigation prop.
problemStatement:
Journey through screens! In a component `HomeScreen({ navigation })`, add a `Button` that, when pressed, calls `navigation.navigate('Details')`.

**Requirement:** Destructure the `navigation` prop correctly.
hints: React Navigation automatically passes the `navigation` prop to all components registered as screens.
expectedOutput: A button that triggers a transition to a new screen (logic verified in code)
